objective: Prove the explicit freeze-contract harness flow where authored run contracts are frozen before baseline capture.
blocking_rule: If the run contract cannot be frozen before baseline capture, stop and write BLOCKED instead of guessing.
in_scope: Freeze the contract state before baseline capture.
Pass the harness gates under the frozen-contract flow.
out_of_scope: Any harness changes outside the sprint-007 artifact directory.

acceptance_criteria.statement: The authored run contract can be frozen with freeze-contract before baseline capture.
gate-generator only accepts the frozen contract state and captures a baseline automatically.
gate-close succeeds after the freeze-contract step.

evaluator_checks: The run uses the freeze-contract step before baseline capture.
No manual baseline seeding is used.
Touched-path scope remains limited to the run directory.
